text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh! And guess what, Mom? I got some fans!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I even got a letter that said, "Your running left a
real impression on me!" Heh, it reminds me of how
popular Dad was!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Huh? Sorry, Mom, the signal's cutting out.
What did you say? ...Uh-huh.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! That's right! ♪ I'm everyone's beloved lil'
girly! I'll keep running til the day I make my
dreams come true and come home with a bunch
of trophies! Hehe! ♪
